[[File:Karil the Tainted chathead.png|left]]
'''Karil the Tainted''' is the fourth oldest of the [[Barrows brothers]]. Karil's crypt is located to the south of the [[Barrows]] area. He uses [[ranged]] equipment, although, unlike a player using [[Karil the Tainted's equipment|his equipment]], he is fairly weak to [[Magic]] attacks. Karil's set effect is '''Tainted Shot''', which gives him a 25% chance per [[successful hit]] to lower the player's [[Agility]] by 20%. Although all damage can be avoided through [[Protect from Missiles]], his set effect will activate regardless if the hit would have been successful.

Karil is weak to both melee attacks and magic attacks, and in particular to [[air spells]].
